description: Universal media player for Hecos. OS-level playback (VLC/mpv), gallery for Drive and Chat, AI-driven playlist management.
author: Hecos Project

auto_advance.description: Automatically advance to the next track when a track ends.

repeat.description: Repeat the queue when it ends.

default_playlist.description: Name of a saved playlist to auto-load at startup (leave empty for none).

media_root_dir.description: Default folder where media files are stored (used for quick scans via LLM).

preferred_backend.description: Preferred playback backend. 'auto' selects the best available.

drive_thumb_size.description: Thumbnail size in Hecos Drive file list.

autoplay_video.description: Autoplay video in the browser gallery player.

autoplay_audio.description: Autoplay audio in the browser gallery player.

show_filmstrip.description: Show the bottom filmstrip thumbnail navigator in the gallery.
